case_title: YAJUN XU VS. HAIGANG GROUP INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EDWARD CHU--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAN TANG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY XU, YAJUN AS TO DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY TONG, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00)NOT SERVED. MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS MADE ON VARIOUS DATES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, YAJUN AS TO DEFENDANT TONG, FRANK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, YAJUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC.
